response.justification: Candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer with strong breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems, but the resume shows no evidence of the 8 years of C++ programming required, nor demonstrated experience leading large-scale cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at the scale this role demands. C++ exposure appears limited to a brief stint at National Instruments (2007-2008) and a bachelor thesis project. Primary languages are TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, which do not satisfy the core technical requirement.
strengths: Long tenure and broad full-stack experience across multiple domains
Track record of mentoring, teaching workshops, and running courses (leadership signal)
Experience with low-latency, high-throughput micro-services at Sociomantic
concerns: Does not meet the 8 years C++ minimum requirement
No demonstrated large-scale cloud compute platform or distributed infrastructure leadership
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at the required scope

key_factors.factor: Lacks large-scale cloud compute platform background
